stories.title: Alexa Plus 获得 AI 更新，可连接更多智能家居设备
stories.sourceTitle: Alexa Plus is getting an AI update to handle more complicated instructions
stories.summary: Amazon 为 Alexa Plus 推出 AI 更新，允许其以新方式连接智能家居设备，目前处于预览阶段，支持 Bosch、Delta、Ecovacs、iRobot、Yale Home、Whirlpool 等品牌。
stories.analysis: 这将增强 Alexa 在智能家居生态中的竞争力，但实际效果取决于设备兼容性和用户体验。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Amazon is launching an update to its Alexa Plus assistant that will allow it to connect to smart home devices in new ways. With the update, which is currently in preview, Alexa Plus can link up with tech from Bosch, Delta, Ecovacs, iRobot, Yale Home, Whirlpool

stories.title: Patreon 裁员 20%，CEO 称并非因为 AI 替代人类
stories.sourceTitle: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of workers
stories.summary: Patreon 裁员约 93 人（占员工 20%），CEO Jack Conte 在备忘录中表示裁员并非因为 AI 替代人类，但 AI 在决策中扮演角色。
stories.analysis: 裁员虽称非因 AI，但 AI 自动化可能加速此类结构调整。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of its workers, or around 93 employees, as reported earlier by 404 Media. In a memo to employees, Patreon CEO Jack Conte writes that the company isn't making these changes "because we believe AI replaces humans," but says AI ha

stories.title: 美国议员拟推出《AI 紧急关闭法案》
stories.sourceTitle: Lawmakers prepare bill requiring AI ‘kill switch’
stories.summary: Politico 报道，众议员 Ted Lieu 和 Nathaniel Moran 准备提出法案，要求 AI 公司按国土安全部命令关闭或限制其 AI 系统。
stories.analysis: 该法案若通过，将显著影响 AI 部署的自主权和安全性。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Lawmakers are preparing to introduce an "AI Kill Switch Act" that would require AI companies to shut down or throttle their systems on orders from the Department of Homeland Security, according to a report from Politico. Reps. Ted Lieu (D-CA) and Nathaniel Mor

stories.title: Claude 语音模式扩展至 Opus 和 Sonnet 模型
stories.sourceTitle: Claude’s voice mode is now available for Opus and Sonnet
stories.summary: Anthropic 将语音模式从 Haiku 扩展到更强大的 Opus 和 Sonnet 模型，并集成到 Gmail、Slack、Canva 等应用中。
stories.analysis: 此举将提升高端模型的实用性和用户粘性。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Until now, voice mode has only been available on Claude Haiku, Anthropic's faster but less powerful model. Now the company is making its Opus and Sonnet models available in voice mode, and extending its reach into apps like Gmail, Slack, and Canva. When Anthro

stories.title: AMD 发布 Helios 机架级 AI 系统挑战 NVIDIA
stories.sourceTitle: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
stories.summary: AMD 推出 Helios 机架级系统，预计今年晚些时候开始向客户发货，直接与 NVIDIA 竞争。
stories.analysis: 这将加剧 AI 基础设施市场的竞争，可能推动硬件降价。
stories.sourceExcerpt: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.

stories.title: 前谷歌安全高管创立的 AegisAI 获 3600 万美元融资，防御 AI 驱动的鱼叉式钓鱼
stories.sourceTitle: AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing
stories.summary: AegisAI 开发 AI agent 分析消息中的细微异常，阻止高级钓鱼攻击，本轮融资 3600 万美元。
stories.analysis: AI 安全防御领域正成为资本热点。
stories.sourceExcerpt: AegisAI co-founders developed AI agents that quickly analyze each message as a human would, paying attention to small anomalies that even the most elaborate checklist wouldn’t catch.

stories.title: OpenAI 向全美用户推出 ChatGPT Health，可接入医疗记录
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI is making big claims as it rolls out ChatGPT Health to everyone
stories.summary: ChatGPT Health 允许用户连接 Apple Health、MyFitnessPal 等健康数据，OpenAI 副总裁称能提供个性化健康建议。
stories.analysis: 该功能可能改变个人健康管理，但需关注数据隐私和准确性。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI is rolling out ChatGPT Health to everyone in the US on Thursday, allowing more people to connect their medical records and health-tracking information to the chatbot. During a briefing, Ashley Alexander, OpenAI's vice president of health product, says t

stories.title: 右翼婴儿潮一代抗议数据中心，与左翼有共同点
stories.sourceTitle: The right-wing boomers protesting data centers have a lot in common with the left
stories.summary: 佛罗里达州居民抗议超大规模数据中心建设，左右翼都担忧环境影响，但动机不同。
stories.analysis: 数据中心扩张面临越来越大的社区阻力。
stories.sourceExcerpt: On a gray, humid Saturday morning in central Florida, a little under a dozen people gathered outside the Spring Hill Branch Library to protest the construction of a hyperscale data center in their community. There was no immediate threat - the Hernando County

stories.title: Anthropic 更新 Claude 语音模式，支持更强大模型
stories.sourceTitle: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models
stories.summary: Claude 语音模式现在可以重排会议或起草邮件，基于更强的模型。
stories.analysis: 语音助手正走向更实用的任务自动化。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.

stories.title: 苹果诉 OpenAI 商业秘密案：谁定义后智能手机时代？
stories.sourceTitle: Apple’s OpenAI lawsuit is about who gets to define the post-smartphone era
stories.summary: The Verge 高级记者分析苹果与 OpenAI 之间的重大商业秘密诉讼，涉及 OpenAI 未来方向。
stories.analysis: 该诉讼将影响 AI 公司与平台方的合作关系。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Today on Decoder, I’m talking with Hayden Field, The Verge’s senior AI reporter, about the major trade secrets lawsuit between Apple and OpenAI and what this tells us about OpenAI’s future. By now I’m sure most Decoder listeners are familiar with Apple’s alleg

stories.title: Runway 推出 AI 模型路由器，自动选择最佳生成模型
stories.sourceTitle: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
stories.summary: Media Router 根据质量、速度或成本优先级，自动选择最佳图像/视频/音频生成模型。
stories.analysis: 这将降低开发者使用多模型的门槛。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.

stories.title: OpenAI 向所有美国用户开放 ChatGPT Health
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI makes ChatGPT Health available to all US users
stories.summary: 用户可集成 Apple Health、Function、MyFitnessPal 等个人数据，使用健康功能。
stories.analysis: AI 健康助手将进入主流使用。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Users can also integrate their personal data from services like Apple Health, Function, and MyFitnessPal.

stories.title: Meta 发布 AI 乐观广告，但配乐却是关于人类灭绝的歌
stories.sourceTitle: Meta launched a new AI optimism ad set to a song about human extinction
stories.summary: Meta 使用 David Bowie 的《五年》作为广告背景，该歌曲描述人类离末日还有五年，引发争议。
stories.analysis: 广告选曲不当可能损害品牌形象。
stories.sourceExcerpt: David Bowie's song "Five Years," which Meta used in a supposedly inspiring advertisement, is about humans learning that they have five years left to live before the apocalypse.

stories.title: 专家称 Kimi K3 并非通过利用 Anthropic 的 Fable 模型变强
stories.sourceTitle: Experts say exploiting Anthropic’s Fable isn’t how Kimi K3 got so good
stories.summary: 专家对 TechCrunch 表示，Kimi K3 的强大性能不能简单归因于从 Fable 模型中提取知识。
stories.analysis: 模型能力竞赛中，蒸馏技术的作用可能被夸大。
stories.sourceExcerpt: "I don't think you get a model this strong and this quickly on the heels of Fable doing strictly distillation," one expert told TechCrunch.

stories.title: NVIDIA 将 GPU 送往月球
stories.sourceTitle: Nvidia is sending GPUs to the moon
stories.summary: NVIDIA 宣布向月球发送 GPU，用于可能的太空计算任务。
stories.analysis: 这标志着 AI 计算开始进入太空应用。
stories.sourceExcerpt: If there's a place in the universe without GPUs, Nvidia is sending them there.

stories.title: AI 芯片初创公司 Etched 估值达 103 亿美元，获顶级投资者支持
stories.sourceTitle: AI chip startup Etched defies skeptics, hits $10.3B valuation from big-name investors
stories.summary: 由三位哈佛辍学生创立的 Etched 开发无需 GPU 即可加速 AI 推理的芯片和存储组件。
stories.analysis: 挑战 NVIDIA 的芯片设计获得资本认可。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Etched, founded by three Harvard dropouts, has created new chips and memory components that speed up inference on any AI model -- no GPUs required, it says.

stories.title: Google Gemini 月活用户接近 10 亿
stories.sourceTitle: Google’s Gemini nears billion-user milestone
stories.summary: Gemini 在 2 月份月活用户超过 7.5 亿，正接近 10 亿大关。
stories.analysis: 用户规模将巩固 Google 在 AI 助手市场的地位。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Gemini had over 750 million monthly users in February.

stories.title: 三星智能眼镜真机曝光：续航 9 小时，与 Google 合作
stories.sourceTitle: Here’s what Samsung’s smart glasses actually look like
stories.summary: 三星与 Google 及眼镜制造商合作，展示两款智能眼镜设计，续航达 9 小时。
stories.analysis: 智能眼镜赛道迎来有力竞争者。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Samsung has given us our first chance to check out its upcoming smart glasses in person, revealing two new designs and the first specs in the process, including an impressive 9-hour battery life. The glasses, developed in collaboration with Google and the eyew

stories.title: AMD 承诺向 Anthropic 投资高达 50 亿美元
stories.sourceTitle: AMD commits up to $5 billion to Anthropic
stories.summary: AMD 将向 Anthropic 投资最多 50 亿美元，并提供算力支持，Anthropic 将部署高达 2 吉瓦的 AMD Instinct MI450 AI 加速器。
stories.analysis: 这标志着 AMD 在 AI 合作伙伴生态上的重大布局。
stories.sourceExcerpt: AMD says it's going to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic, while helping to expand the AI company's computing power, according to an announcement on Wednesday. As part of the new partnership, Anthropic will deploy up to 2 gigawatts of AMD's Instinct MI450 AI

stories.title: Meta 自研 AI 检测系统 Content Seal，但被指应直接使用 Google 方案
stories.sourceTitle: Meta made its own AI detection system. It should have just used Google’s
stories.summary: Meta 推出 Content Seal 水印系统以标记 AI 生成内容，但批评者认为应采用已有的 Google 技术。
stories.analysis: AI 检测标准碎片化可能不利于行业统一。
stories.sourceExcerpt: IIn March, Meta's Oversight Board called on the company to "meet its public commitments and employ its own tools" to help quell the spread of deceptive generative AI content across platforms. Meta responded in July by introducing Content Seal - an invisible wa

stories.title: OpenAI 在乔治亚州埃芬汉县建设 AI 基础设施（Project Camellia）
stories.sourceTitle: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
stories.summary: OpenAI 宣布 Project Camellia，承诺负责任能源、社区投资、就业和 Codex 访问。
stories.analysis: 大型 AI 项目将带动地方经济，但也需关注环保争议。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.

stories.title: 新闻机构如何利用 AI 推进其重要使命
stories.sourceTitle: How news organizations are using AI to advance their vital missions
stories.summary: 新闻机构使用 AI 加强报道、扩大受众和改善业务运营，OpenAI 工具支持全球记者和出版商。
stories.analysis: AI 正成为新闻行业的辅助工具。
stories.sourceExcerpt: News organizations are using AI to strengthen reporting, grow audiences, and improve business operations, with OpenAI tools supporting journalists and publishers worldwide.

stories.title: OpenAI 与美国能源部合作推进国家科学进步
stories.sourceTitle: Advancing the next era of national science
stories.summary: OpenAI 承诺与美国国家实验室合作，使用前沿 AI 加速科学发现。
stories.analysis: AI 在基础科学领域的应用将进一步深化。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI outlines its commitment to advancing American science working with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI to accelerate discovery.

stories.title: OpenAI 推出 Presence：企业 AI 代理平台
stories.sourceTitle: Introducing OpenAI Presence
stories.summary: OpenAI Presence 是一个经过验证的企业 AI 代理平台，帮助部署可信的语音和聊天代理用于客户和工作流。
stories.analysis: 这将推动 AI 代理在企业中的大规模采用。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.

stories.title: NTT DATA 使用 Codex 将事件分析时间缩短至 30 分钟
stories.sourceTitle: NTT DATA Group cuts incident analysis to 30 minutes with Codex
stories.summary: NTT DATA 利用 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 帮助 9000 名员工实现工作自动化，事件分析从数小时缩短至 30 分钟。
stories.analysis: Codex 在企业自动化中的价值得到验证。
stories.sourceExcerpt: NTT DATA Group uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to help 9,000 employees automate work, cut incident analysis to 30 minutes, and scale secure AI adoption.

stories.title: David Vélez 和 Robin Vince 加入 OpenAI 基金会和 OpenAI Group PBC 董事会
stories.sourceTitle: David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC
stories.summary: 两位金融和科技领袖加入 OpenAI 董事会，带来全球领导力经验。
stories.analysis: 此举将增强 OpenAI 的治理和战略执行力。
stories.sourceExcerpt: David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC, bringing global leadership in finance, technology, and governance.

stories.title: 智能体政策新闻相关背景和简要解读
stories.sourceTitle: 智能体政策新闻相关背景和简要解读
stories.summary: 量子位报道的智能体政策新闻，涉及国内外 AI 竞争与治理变化。
stories.analysis: AI 智能体的监管框架正在加速形成。

stories.title: Qwen 发布 Qwen3Guard：Token 流实时安全护栏模型
stories.sourceTitle: Qwen3Guard: Real-time Safety for Your Token Stream
stories.summary: Qwen3Guard 是 Qwen 家族首个安全护栏模型，基于 Qwen3 微调，用于实时安全分类。
stories.analysis: 这为 AI 内容安全提供了一种新的底层保障手段。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Tech Report GitHub Hugging Face ModelScope DISCORD Introduction We are excited to introduce Qwen3Guard, the first safety guardrail model in the Qwen family. Built upon the powerful Qwen3 foundation models and fine-tuned specifically for safety classificatoin,
